{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = South Provisional Exhibition Tournament
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|In the finals of a [[South Provisional Exhibition Tournament]], fighters must change weapons every round.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c30">''The Knight'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon events]]
